g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the training data strategy for GigShield AI?')
g.text: Public weather · AQI · IMD historical data + synthetic disruption labels

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does GigShield handle cold start for new workers?')
g.text: Stage 1: Zone avg premium — no worker data yet
Stage 2: Blend zone + partial worker data (weeks 1–4)
Stage 3: Full personalized model (4+ weeks history)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What weather data feeds into GigShield AI?')
sendPrompt('What AQI data feeds into GigShield AI?')
sendPrompt('What order signals feed into GigShield AI?')
sendPrompt('What worker history feeds into GigShield AI?')
sendPrompt('What GPS logs feed into GigShield AI?')
sendPrompt('How does GigShield XGBoost risk assessment model work?')
sendPrompt('How does GigShield income prediction model work?')
sendPrompt('How does GigShield dynamic premium engine work?')
sendPrompt('How does GigShield fraud detection system work?')
g.text: GPS spoofing detection · Activity cross-check · Behavioral anomaly · Duplicate prevention
Logic: active worker + verified location + no anomaly = eligible claim

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does GigShield payout decision engine work?')
g.text: Risk score + income gap + fraud check → instant UPI payout
